command_log.command: find /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel -maxdepth 1 -name "state_*" -type f -exec sh -c 'echo "$(basename $1): wf=$(jq -r ".workflow_name" "$1") cursor=$(jq -r ".cursor" "$1") status=$(jq -r ".status" "$1")"' _ {} \;
